title: pulsatilla alpina subsp. font-queri
intro: Pulsatilla alpina subsp. font-queri, also known as the Font-Quer's meadow rue, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a sedative, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Pulsatilla alpina subsp. font-queri include relieving menstrual cramps, soothing anxiety and insomnia, and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms associated with PMS and menopause.
